orb_compression.description: ORB + ORION compression pre-filter: only enter breakout when market is in compression zone

orb_squeeze_filter.description: ORB + BBKC squeeze release gate: only enter breakout on squeeze release events

orb_atr_stops.description: ORB with ATR-based stops instead of range-based stops

pb_squeeze_filter.description: PB + BBKC squeeze release gate: only enter pullback on squeeze release

orb_sweep_confirm.description: ORB + ICT sweep confirmation: long only after low sweep, short only after high sweep

pb_compression_filter.description: PB + ORION compression pre-filter: only enter pullback in compression zones

orb_momentum_confirm.description: ORB + BBKC momentum direction: long only when lime, short only when red

pb_momentum_exit.description: PB with BBKC momentum deceleration exit: exit long on green, exit short on maroon

pb_range_stops.description: PB with range-based stops instead of ATR-based stops

vix_momentum_exit.description: VIX Channel with momentum state exit: exit long on green, exit short on maroon

vix_atr_stops.description: VIX Channel with ATR-based stops instead of RV-scaled implied move

vix_compression_confirm.description: VIX Channel + compression confirmation: only enter when compression is active

vix_sweep_confirm.description: VIX Channel + ICT sweep confirmation: only enter in sweep direction

pb_relaxed_filters.description: PB with relaxed filters: remove ADX gate, widen session windows, lower vol threshold

vix_adx_confirm.description: VIX Channel + ADX trend filter: only enter when ADX > 14 confirms trending
